case_title: RENE L MCLEAN VS. GONZALO LOPEZ MIRANDA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCLEAN, RENE L AS TO DEFENDANT MIRANDA, GONZALO LOPEZ AKA GONZALO MIRANDA LOPEZ, AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCLEAN, RENE L RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MIRANDA, GONZALO LOPEZ AKA GONZALO MIRANDA LOPEZ, AN INDIVIDUAL $15,308.30 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,308.30, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCLEAN, RENE L RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MIRANDA, GONZALO LOPEZ AKA GONZALO MIRANDA LOPEZ, AN INDIVIDUAL $7,432.84 PRINCIPAL, $19.94 INTEREST, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,652.78, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $7,625.52 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCLEAN, RENE L

PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCLEAN, RENE L SERVED SEP-06-2019, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT MIRANDA, GONZALO LOPEZ AKA GONZALO MIRANDA LOPEZ, AN INDIVIDUAL PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION.
